workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: I need you to process this support ticket from Wide World Importers. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 10:06 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 08:01 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Wide World Importers

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-04 15:41 EST
Subject: Re: Re: migration architecture Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Wide World Importers: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
